Record section renders (No available records for this API-funded lead = expected); Activity Log shows REVIEW + CORRESPONDENCE entries

Inactivate flow confirmed on junk clone 534534_clone (pk=61): uncheck Active -> required 'Termination Reason*' (200..1100,000-Other) -> SAVE -> is_active=false; reactivated/restored. FINDING: without Termination Reason the SAVE silently does NOT persist (no error toast, only inline error class) = minor UX gap
